hooks.command: bash -c 'file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$file" == */.github/workflows/*.yml || "$file" == */.github/workflows/*.yaml || "$file" == */.github/actions/*/*.yml || "$file" == */.github/actions/*/*.yaml ]]; then actionlint "$file"; fi'
bash -c 'file=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [[ "$file" == *.sh ]]; then shellcheck "$file"; fi'
